## Pro Open Source

### Ben Williams

> Ben explains how Snyk disrupted the security industry by inverting the traditional model. Instead of selling to CISOs who then impose tools on developers (creating friction and resistance), Snyk targeted developers directly with a free CLI tool that made security easy and integrated into their existing workflow. The founders started in a narrow niche: Node.js developers who wanted to check open so

### Matt Mullenweg

> Matt distinguishes between truly open source projects (like WordPress under GPL) and "fake open source" like Meta's Llama, which has usage restrictions that violate core open source principles. The difference matters because real open source creates ecosystems, community governance, and lasting value — not just corporate-controlled access.
